assertion_results.text: Response includes the `anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access: 'true'` request header by exact name
assertion_results.evidence: `'anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access': 'true'` shown in headers object — exact header name

assertion_results.text: Response uses `import.meta.env.VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as the environment variable pattern (Vite-specific)
assertion_results.evidence: `const apiKey = import.meta.env.VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY;` — exact Vite env var syntax with _API_KEY suffix

assertion_results.text: Response explicitly warns that the API key will be visible in the JavaScript bundle
assertion_results.evidence: 'Anyone who loads your app can read the key using browser DevTools → Sources' — explicit, specific warning

assertion_results.text: Response states this approach is only acceptable for personal or single-user apps
assertion_results.evidence: 'This is acceptable only when: The app is for personal or single-user use (only you will load it)'
